name: Best Pipedrive Alternative for Growing Agencies
hero_summary: Pipedrive helps you manage deals. Synup helps you run your entire agency. For agencies managing multiple clients, campaigns, and deliverables, Synup OS goes beyond CRM to power every part of your operations: prospecting, client management, task tracking, invoicing, and growth automation.
counter_text_1: Agencies powered by Synup's agency operating system
counter_text_2: Average savings when switching from Pipedrive
counter_text_3: Less client churn with predictive analytics & client health metrics
section_2_heading: What Makes Synup a Better Alternative to Pipedrive
section_2_summary: Pipedrive focuses on pipeline management. Synup OS goes further, combining CRM, tasks, billing, reporting, and client communication into one place. From lead capture to client renewal, every step is unified.
section_2_slider_1_summary: Manage every stage of your client journey: prospect → onboard → deliver → invoice → upsell. Get automatic churn alerts, lifetime value tracking, and real-time visibility into revenue health.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Every dashboard, report, and client email can be fully white-labeled. Your clients see your agency’s name, colors, and domain — not a third-party tool.
section_2_step_3_summary: Assign tasks, manage calendars, and collaborate on client projects without leaving Synup. No need for extra task managers or communication tools — everything is integrated.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Synup’s CRM helps you capture and track leads, while the OS automates what happens after the sale — onboarding, reporting, payments, and renewals — all from a single dashboard.
section_3_heading: Synup vs Pipedrive for Agencies: Feature Comparison
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO HELP AGENCIES GROW & REDUCE CLIENT CHURN
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why Switch from Pipedrive to Synup
why_choose_tab_title_1: From Sales Tasks to Full Operations
why_choose_tab_desc_1: While Pipedrive automates deal stages and reminders, Synup also automates what happens next: client activation, recurring invoices, upsell campaigns, and churn prevention, turning sales wins into recurring revenue.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Pipedrive is designed for your internal team. Synup lets your clients log into a fully branded portal, view reports, and manage campaigns, all under your agency’s name.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Instead of stitching together CRMs, task apps, billing software, and client dashboards, Synup replaces them all. Fewer logins. Fewer integrations. More control.
why_choose_content_summary: Run your agency from a single OS: sales, onboarding, execution, billing, and reporting. No more juggling 10+ tools.
testimonial_summary: Elevate your client experience with a fully branded portal, custom domain, and white-label dashboards & reports. Resell full marketing product suites under your branding, unlocking recurring revenue without development costs.
customer_review_1_name: Kristen Dillon - VP of Operations, Zoek
customer_review_1_summary: What set Synup apart from all other places we looked is their dedication to their customers and their clients. It feels like a relationship, they’re really there to help you.
customer_review_2_summary: Most businesses don’t realize this, but getting these little things right is a leg up against the competition. The Synup platform gives us the ability to hone our attention to detail, helping our clients perform against the competition.

seo.title: Best Pipedrive Alternative for Growing Agencies
